message:
test(lab): deterministic HTTP and reactor tests, graded obligation refinements

- tests/lab_determinism.rs: add ~200 lines of new deterministic lab
  tests exercising virtual HTTP and reactor interactions. Import IoOp,
  Wake/Waker for noop waker construction. Add NoopWaker helper.
- lab/http/{client,harness,mod}.rs: minor API adjustments for test
  integration (signatures, doc tweaks).
- lab/mod.rs: doc/export updates for http sub-module.
- obligation/graded.rs: refinements to graded type ergonomics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
